title: Healthy 365
text:
Healthy 365 - SupportGoWhere
Healthy 365
Share link
Healthy 365 is a mobile application that helps resident to discover and access healthy lifestyle offerings that will help them to achieve their health goals.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Self-directed programmes to engage residents to initiate and sustain healthy lifestyle behaviours
Real-time rewards for achieving desired healthy lifestyle behaviours
Download the Healthy 365 app from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store
Collapse all sections
About this support

Track your daily physical activity and sleep duration with a compatible wearable

Use the meal log tool to monitor your daily calorie intake

Participate in challenges such as the National Steps Challenge™ and Eat, Drink, Shop Healthy Challenge

Earn Healthpoints and redeem Healthpoints from a catalogue of lifestyle rewards

Participate in recommended programmes and booking activities, such as free exercise classes and health workshops.

Enjoy access to informative resources and partner programmes

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens, Permanent Residents or Foreign Identification Number (FIN) holders aged 15 and above with a Singpass account

How to apply?

Download the Healthy 365 app on Apple Store / Google Play

Follow the on-screen steps to create a new account or log-in to your Healthy 365 app

You will need your Singpass account to sign up for a Healthy 365 account

Where can I find help?

View more details

HPB hotline: 1800 223 1313
Operating Hours: Mon - Fri 8.00am - 6.00pm

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 04 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
